steps.t: Andras is at the Ox-clan encampment in Nan Curunír. You should return to Andras with news of your successes.
Andras is at the Ox-clan encampment in Nan Curunír. You should return at once to Andras with news of your success and your discovery within Saruman's …
Andras is at the Ox-clan encampment in Nan Curunír. You should return to Andras and tell him that Saruman's rings of power have been destroyed.
